message:
feat: integrate metal0 as submodule for schema-aware JIT compilation

Add metal0 Python-to-native compiler as git submodule and create
codegen module for JIT compilation of @logic_table with Lance schema.

- Add deps/metal0 submodule pointing to local metal0 repo
- Create src/codegen/metal0_jit.zig with JitContext and schema conversion
- Wire metal0.compileWithSchema API for fused query+logic compilation
- Export lanceql.codegen module in build.zig
